user.title: Set up PV Climate Controller
user.description: Shadow mode remains enabled by default. Choose only confirmed entities.

energy.title: PV & energy policy
energy.description: These sources determine when PV power would be available for cooling. They do not change climate devices.

safety.title: Safety & EMS
safety.description: Shadow mode blocks all climate commands. The EMS grant is read only.

menu_options.manage_zone: Edit or remove an existing room

add_zone.title: Add room – connection
add_zone.description: Step 1 of 2: map the room and confirmed data sources.

add_zone_tuning.title: Add room – comfort profile
add_zone_tuning.description: Step 2 of 2: set comfort and thermal weighting.

edit_zone.title: Edit room – connection
edit_zone.description: Step 1 of 2: room name and data sources.

edit_zone_tuning.title: Edit room – comfort profile
edit_zone_tuning.description: Step 2 of 2: comfort, limit, priority and backup.

remove_zone.title: Remove room
remove_zone.description: Only this controller mapping is removed. The climate device and its automations remain unchanged.

error.already_configured: This climate device is already assigned to a room.
error.invalid_temperature_limits: The hard temperature limit must be at least the comfort temperature.

abort.zone_not_found: The selected room was not found.
